narrative:
Eden Twp township has 1,326 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.1 percentage points.
